en.title: Best Water Filters of 2026: Pitchers, Under-Sink and Reverse Osmosis Ranked
en.description: Lab-tested water filters ranked for lead, PFAS and TDS removal, spanning $35 pitchers to full reverse osmosis systems, with the NSF certifications and filter costs that actually matter.

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳淨水器排行榜：濾水壺、櫥下型與逆滲透實測推薦
zh-tw.description: 從一千多元的濾水壺到整套逆滲透，用除鉛、除 PFAS、除 TDS 的實驗室數據排名，把 NSF 認證和濾芯成本一次講清楚。

en.description: Under-sink reverse osmosis with built-in remineralization, a 1:1 pure-to-drain ratio and app-tracked filter sensors, scoring 9.24/10 in independent lab testing.

zh-tw.description: 櫥下型逆滲透，內建礦物質回添，出水對排水做到 1:1，還有 APP 追蹤濾芯壽命。實驗室實測拿到 9.24 分，礦化後 TDS 維持在 66 ppm，喝起來比一般純水順口很多，這台是我心中的整體首選。

en.description: Countertop 4-stage reverse osmosis that removes 84 IAPMO-certified contaminants and collects water in a borosilicate glass carafe, with zero plumbing or drilling.

zh-tw.description: 免安裝的檯面型四道逆滲透，IAPMO 認證實測除掉 84 種污染物，純水裝進玻璃壺而不是塑膠桶，少了塑化劑溶出的疑慮。租屋族不能動水管又想要逆滲透水質，這台幾乎是唯一解。

en.description: Five-stage under-sink reverse osmosis built in the USA that ranked first in TechGearLab's December 2025 test, running about $75 a year in replacement filters.

zh-tw.description: 美國製的五道櫥下型逆滲透，TechGearLab 2025 年 12 月實測把它排在十三台之首，贏過貴三倍的無桶機種。一年濾芯成本才台幣兩千出頭，想要逆滲透又不想被高階機種的價格嚇跑，這台就是甜蜜點。

en.description: Tankless under-sink reverse osmosis pushing 800 gallons a day at a 3:1 ratio with integrated UV sterilization, the top-scoring tankless RO in lab testing at 9.21/10.

zh-tw.description: 無桶式櫥下逆滲透，一天出水 800 加侖，出水對排水 3:1，還內建 UV 殺菌。實驗室量到的實際產水量甚至超過原廠標示，接水幾乎不用等。家裡人多、用水量大又受不了傳統壓力桶佔空間，這台就是為你準備的。

en.description: Under-sink RO paired with Aquasana's Claryum carbon block, certified to NSF 42, 53, 58 and 401 for 88 contaminants and finished with a remineralizer for taste.

zh-tw.description: 櫥下逆滲透再串一道 Aquasana 自家的 Claryum 活性碳，拿到 NSF 42、53、58、401 四項認證，實測除掉 88 種污染物，包含 95% 的氟。逆滲透後再礦化回添鈣鎂鉀，喝起來有回甘。想要認證項目最完整的那一台，選它準沒錯。

en.description: Six-stage under-sink RO with an alkaline remineralization stage, NSF 58 certified and built for DIY install with quick-fit push tubing.

zh-tw.description: 六道櫥下逆滲透，多一道鹼性礦化把礦物質補回來，NSF 58 認證，推入式快接管線讓你自己動手裝也不會卡關。想要弱鹼性口感又不想多花錢買品牌溢價，這台是 CP 值很高的務實選擇。

en.description: The pitcher Consumer Reports names best for most people, with a fast flow rate and lead-reducing filtration that rivals far pricier systems.

zh-tw.description: Consumer Reports 直接點名最適合大多數人的濾水壺，過濾速度快，除鉛表現追得上很多貴一大截的機種。一千出頭、免安裝、放進冰箱就能用，第一次認真淨水的人從這台開始最實在。

en.description: A five-stage pitcher that drives TDS to zero and ships with a water-quality meter, the go-to pick for high-TDS tap water where taste needs the deepest scrub.

zh-tw.description: 五道過濾的濾水壺，能把 TDS 壓到接近零，還附一支水質檢測筆讓你親眼看到數字。住在自來水 TDS 偏高的區域、對水味特別敏感的話，這台的過濾深度是濾水壺裡最狠的。濾芯消耗快是它的代價。

en.description: A compact two-stage under-sink carbon block that installs in minutes without a separate faucet, delivering full-pressure filtered water straight from the tap.

zh-tw.description: 小巧的兩道櫥下活性碳，幾分鐘就裝好，不用另外拉專用龍頭，直接從原本水龍頭出全水壓的過濾水。不想搞逆滲透那套廢水和壓力桶，只想把氯味和沉積物濾掉、出水又快，這台剛剛好。

en.description: Brita's only NSF 53 lead-certified pitcher, with a 6-month Elite filter that keeps the lowest running cost of any pitcher we tracked.

zh-tw.description: Brita 唯一拿到 NSF 53 除鉛認證的濾水壺，搭 Elite 濾芯能撐半年才換一次，長期算下來每公升成本是所有濾水壺裡最低的。預算有限又想要一台不用常換濾芯的入門壺，這台最省心。

references.title: 8 Best Reverse Osmosis Systems of 2026 We've Tested
The Best Water Filters of 2026 | Lab Tested & Ranked
Cloud RO Review: What the Lab Test Revealed 2026

en.commentary: I rank Cloud RO first because it fixes the two things that make people quietly hate reverse osmosis: the stripped, flat taste and the three-gallons-wasted-per-gallon math. It builds remineralization in at no extra cost and runs a genuine 1:1 efficiency ratio, then backs it with a 9.24/10 lab score and NSF 58 certification. That is the rare RO system I would install and forget about. The real story of 2026 is that reverse osmosis has gone mainstream, driven by PFAS and lead headlines, and the field has split into clear lanes. If you can drill under your sink and want the best value, the APEC ROES-50 is a 20-year-old design that still ranked first at TechGearLab and costs about $75 a year to feed. If you rent or refuse to touch plumbing, the AquaTru Carafe delivers certified RO water into a glass carafe with nothing but a power outlet. For a big household, the tankless Waterdrop G3P800 pours 800 gallons a day with UV on top. Pitchers still earn their place. The PUR Plus is the one I hand to anyone starting out at $35, and the Brita Elite is the only pitcher I trust for certified lead reduction at the lowest running cost. Match the filter to your water report and your sink, and every option here holds up.

highlights.title: Cloud RO wins by solving RO's two oldest complaints
highlights.body: Reverse osmosis has always carried two knocks: flat-tasting water and heavy waste. Cloud RO answers both directly. Its built-in remineralization stage adds back calcium, magnesium, potassium and zinc and holds TDS around 66 ppm, so the water tastes alive, and its 1:1 efficiency ratio sends one gallon to drain for every gallon it makes. A 9.24/10 lab score and NSF 58 certification confirm the removal is real, and app-based filter sensors mean you replace cartridges on data instead of guesswork.

highlights.title: The APEC ROES-50 is the value benchmark the whole category answers to
highlights.body: A design that has been on the market for two decades still ranked first out of thirteen systems in TechGearLab's December 2025 test, beating tankless units that cost triple. It uses a proven Dow Filmtec membrane, reduces nearly every tested pollutant to undetectable levels, and runs about $75 a year in filters. If you can spare an afternoon and a spot under the sink, this is the most water quality per dollar on the market.

highlights.title: AquaTru Carafe is the answer for renters who can't touch plumbing
highlights.body: Certified reverse osmosis usually means drilling, a drain saddle and a dedicated faucet. The AquaTru Carafe removes 84 IAPMO-certified contaminants including PFAS, lead and fluoride using nothing but a countertop and a power outlet, then collects the result in a borosilicate glass carafe that sidesteps the microplastic leaching of plastic RO tanks. Filters cost more per gallon than a plumbed system, which is the fair trade for zero installation.

highlights.title: Pick your filter from your water report, not the price tag
highlights.body: The right choice starts with what is actually in your water. High TDS or bad taste points to ZeroWater's five-stage pitcher and its bundled meter. A lead advisory points to anything NSF 53 certified, which the Brita Elite and every RO system here carry. PFAS or fluoride concern points to reverse osmosis, full stop, since carbon pitchers do not reliably remove them. Buy the certification that matches your problem and skip paying for the ones you do not need.

zh-tw.commentary: 我把 Cloud RO 放第一，因為它一次解決了大家私底下最討厭逆滲透的兩件事:純水喝起來死板板，還有出一加侖廢三加侖的浪費。它把礦化功能免費內建進去，礦化後 TDS 維持在 66 ppm,喝起來有活性;出水對排水做到真正的 1:1,幾乎不浪費。再加上實驗室 9.24 分和 NSF 58 認證背書，這是少數我裝了就能忘記它存在的逆滲透。2026 年最大的變化，是逆滲透因為 PFAS 和鉛的新聞而正式走向大眾，整個市場也分出清楚的路線。能在水槽下鑽孔、又想要最高 CP 值，APEC ROES-50 這個賣了二十年的老設計照樣在 TechGearLab 拿下第一，一年濾芯才台幣兩千出頭。租屋族不能動水管，AquaTru Carafe 插上電就把認證等級的逆滲透水裝進玻璃壺。家裡人多用水兇，無桶的 Waterdrop G3P800 一天出水 800 加侖還附 UV 殺菌。濾水壺也還有它的位置，PUR Plus 是我會推薦給每個新手的一千元入門款，Brita Elite 則是長期成本最低、又有除鉛認證的那一台。先看你家的水質報告和水槽條件，再對號入座，這份榜單上每一台都站得住腳。

highlights.title: Cloud RO 靠解決逆滲透兩個老毛病拿下第一
highlights.body: 逆滲透長年被嫌兩件事:水喝起來死板，還有廢水太兇。Cloud RO 兩個都正面回應。內建礦化把鈣、鎂、鉀、鋅補回來，TDS 穩定在 66 ppm 左右，水喝起來有活性;1:1 的效率比代表每做一加侖純水只排一加侖廢水。實驗室 9.24 分加上 NSF 58 認證證明除污是玩真的，APP 濾芯感測器讓你照數據換濾芯，不用再憑感覺猜。

highlights.title: APEC ROES-50 是整個品類都要對標的 CP 值標竿
highlights.body: 一個在市場上賣了二十年的設計，在 TechGearLab 2025 年 12 月的實測裡照樣從十三台中拿下第一，贏過貴三倍的無桶機。它用經過驗證的 Dow Filmtec 膜，幾乎把所有受測污染物壓到偵測不到，一年濾芯成本大約台幣兩千出頭。只要你騰得出一個下午和水槽下一塊空間，這台就是每一塊錢換到最多水質的選擇。

highlights.title: 不能動水管的租屋族，答案就是 AquaTru Carafe
highlights.body: 認證等級的逆滲透通常意味著鑽孔、接排水、拉專用龍頭。AquaTru Carafe 只要一塊檯面和一個插座，就實測除掉 84 種 IAPMO 認證的污染物，包含 PFAS、鉛和氟，純水還裝進玻璃壺，避開塑膠壓力桶的微塑膠溶出。濾芯每公升成本比固定式高，這是換來免安裝的合理代價。

highlights.title: 選濾水器要看水質報告，不是看價格標籤
highlights.body: 正確的選擇從你家水裡到底有什麼開始。TDS 高或水味差，就往 ZeroWater 五道濾水壺和它附的檢測筆走。收到鉛超標通知，就認明 NSF 53 認證，Brita Elite 和這裡每一台逆滲透都有。擔心 PFAS 或氟，那就直接上逆滲透，因為活性碳濾水壺沒辦法穩定濾掉這兩樣。買對應你問題的那張認證，不需要的就別多花錢。
